migratedTests.summary: Migrated from localStorage-only communication flow to E01/E04 API-backed parent message, teacher reply, scope denial, parent visibility, and director feedback status coverage.
Migrated from fixed mock metrics to E03/E07 admin aggregation, trends, weekly report generation/export/share/archive, and feedback status coverage.
Migrated from old demo parse assertions to E05/E08 provider contract checks, missing-env provider_unavailable, text fallback, saved parse result, and consultation persistence.
Migrated demoSeed/storybook assertions to E09/E10 child scope, local export/share, and real API isolation.
Migrated from mock draft/localStorage persistence to E01/E02/E08 records API persistence, parent API visibility, and cross-class teacher denial.
Migrated old disabled replica expectations to current E10 disabled MVP controls, local-only draft isolation, and login redirect protection.

fixedRegressions.summary: Parent storybook demoSeed requests with nested snapshot.child.className no longer trip class-scope 403; explicit child mismatch and role guards remain enforced.

classification.testName: D08 parent teacher communication round trip persists across roles
classification.failure: Legacy test asserted old localStorage-only flow and fixed UI state.
classification.action: Updated test to verify API-backed parent message, teacher reply, teacher2 403, parent visibility, and director feedback status.

classification.testName: D08 director dashboard summarizes current API records instead of fixed mock
classification.failure: Legacy test expected fixed mock metrics and old conversation buckets.
classification.action: Updated test to verify E03/E07 aggregation, trends, weekly report create/export/share/archive, and feedback status.

classification.testName: D08 health material parse and consultation persist across teacher director parent
classification.failure: Legacy test expected old local demo parsing copy and did not model missing provider env explicitly.
classification.action: Updated test to verify text fallback, image/audio missing-env provider_unavailable, saved parse result, high-risk consultation creation/status update, and scoped visibility.

classification.testName: D08 parent storybook demoSeed stays isolated from real provider and remote state
classification.failure: Real parent storybook AI route treated nested snapshot.child.className as forged class scope and returned 403; legacy assertions also expected old seed behavior.
classification.action: Allowed parent-storybook to ignore JSON className hints while keeping explicit child scope checks; updated demoSeed isolation/export/share coverage.

classification.testName: D08 teacher records persist after refresh and are visible to parent
classification.failure: Legacy test relied on mock draft/localStorage persistence instead of records API/service persistence.
classification.action: Updated test to write records through API, verify refresh-safe teacher UI, parent API visibility, and teacher2 cross-class denial.

classification.testName: D08 visual-only actions are disabled or explicitly labeled and demo drafts do not hit remote state
classification.failure: Legacy test expected old disabled admin replica state rather than current E10 MVP controls.
classification.action: Updated test to verify current login-disabled controls, E10 disabled MVP buttons, local demo draft isolation, and login redirect role protection.

classification.failure: Legacy feature config did not support PRODUCT_BASE_URL/BUGBASH_BASE_URL reuse and could confuse stale .next/dev/lock with a live server.
classification.action: Updated baseURL/port priority, skip flags, and R02 artifact output; removed stale lock-based reuse.

risks: Optional local brain/vivo services are still not configured; tests cover explicit fallback/provider_unavailable behavior rather than fake success.
The worktree contained many pre-existing E02-E11 changes; R02 avoided reverting unrelated files.
notes: R02 completed. Feature smoke output is under artifacts/product-completion/R02/. Final port check showed 127.0.0.1:3330 was not listening after tests.
